triples into the normative model graph
and sets the default namespace prefix.
For .xmi files the EA database path is bypassed entirely. Task calls XMIParser.parse()
directly — a SAX-based parser that walks the XMI XML elements using the XMLMode/
XMLInterpreter framework (from the Kena sax package) and populates a raw OntModel
via XMIModel operations. The raw model is then passed to LegacyCIMInterpreterImpl
(returned by CIMInterpreterFactory for .xmi extensions), which applies a simplified
post-processing pipeline without the EA-specific namespace resolution or stereotype
